User.title: User Profile
User.description: User account document associated with authorization role inside Voxroom live community.

uid.description: Unique user credentials identifier from Firebase Auth.

role.description: The custom control permissions level assigned to this user.

lastLogin.description: Last successful authentication timestamp on server.

status.description: Current active accessibility presence inside rooms.

micStatus.description: Voice queue processing status of this user.

handRaised.description: Whether the user has raised their hand for voice access.

isSpeaking.description: Active voice channel stream amplitude speaking signature.

handRaisedAt.description: Timestamp when the hand was raised.

Meeting.title: Meeting State
Meeting.description: The current lifecycle state of the meeting room.

status.description: The current state of the global room session.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp of the last status transition.

ChatMessage.title: Chat Message
ChatMessage.description: Public chat message broadcasted in the room.

users/{uid}.description: User identity database storing authorization role configuration indices.
